subject: Fermi-GBM GRB misclassifications
body:
S.Poolakkil (UAH) and F. Berlato (MPE) report on behalf of the Fermi GBM
Team:

"The following Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) triggers,
tentatively classified as GRBs, were in fact likely due to particle
activity:

528208493 / 170927524 / 12:34:48.34 UT
528217663 / 170927630 / 15:07:38.04 UT

"
